robust_sql: WITH base AS (SELECT * FROM Transcripts), dedup AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY transcript_date ORDER BY rowid DESC) AS rn FROM base) SELECT MAX(transcript_date) AS last_transcript_date FROM dedup WHERE rn = 1
